violations.text: The warewashing area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025
Dumpster lid was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025
Condensate lines observed draining into basin of 3 bay sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain in a proper manner. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025
